goal: Rebrand & promote English Vidya for ASOP campaign. Build a stunning premium, ultra-minimal landing page with expand/shrink morphing cards, professional navigation headers, multi-column footers, About Us, Contact Us, and a dedicated Legal page with Disclaimer, Privacy, and Limited Liability.
strategy: Keep all original SPA learning files (app.js, style.css, index.html, data) to retain the dictionary, flashcards, and grammar modules. Enhance index.html, app.js, and style.css using pure vanilla technologies to simulate a $50K high-fidelity website at ₹0 infrastructure cost.
security_and_bug_rules: Rule 1: Sane inputs - Escape all user forms via escHtml() to prevent XSS.
Rule 2: Fallbacks - Feature detection for clip-path/animations to prevent browser crashes on sub-₹10K devices.
Rule 3: Leak prevention - Use single-container event delegation for expand/shrink interactions to prevent memory bloat.
Rule 4: Storage boundaries - Cap contact submissions to 10 in localStorage to prevent storage overflow.

design_specs.theme: Circular reveal clip-path light/dark transition wave.
design_specs.logo: Secular graduate cap icon (🎓) representing English Vidya.
design_specs.home_page: Clean and minimal hero + 3 morphing expandable cards (1. What We Do, 2. Our Plans, 3. What's Coming Next) that expand gracefully on click.
design_specs.footer: Home, About Us, Contact Us, and Legal Section (Disclaimer, Privacy, Limited Liability).

steps: Step 1: Save JSON plan and update task list.
Step 2: Update index.html header with 🎓 logo and desktop nav structure.
Step 3: Redesign renderDashboard() in app.js with morphing expandable cards and features list.
Step 4: Integrate renderFooter(), renderAboutPage(), renderContactPage(), and renderLegalPage() in app.js.
Step 5: Write hardware-accelerated CSS and circular reveal animations in style.css.
